title: kuhnia kuhnia
intro: Kuhnia kuhnia, also known as the Mexican tea or White Sage, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral agent. The health benefits of Kuhnia kuhnia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Kuhnia kuhnia can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
